nasb.text: Then Samuel said to Saul, “Wait, and let me tell you what the Lord said to me last night.” And he said to him, “Speak!”

esv.text: Then Samuel said to Saul, “Stop! I will tell you what the Lord said to me this night.” And he said to him, “Speak.”

cnv.text: 撒母耳對掃羅說：“住口吧！讓我把耶和華昨天晚上對我所說的話告訴你。”掃羅對他說：“請說。”

ccb.text: 撒母耳对扫罗说：“住口！让我告诉你耶和华昨天晚上对我说的话。”扫罗答道：“请说。”
